candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Other current assets excluding cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Current assets component, but not total current assets.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Noncurrent balancing line, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line, preferred over cash-flow beginning/end cash lines.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Matches ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Cash-flow line for opening cash, not period-end balance-sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Other current assets excluding cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Explicitly excludes cash.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, wrong maturity bucket.
Non-current balancing line, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Represents current maturities of long-term debt, but a cleaner total current interest-bearing debt line exists.
Best clean total for short-term/current interest-bearing debt; aligns with STD definition and excludes lease-specific rows.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Valid component of STD excluding leases, but appears to be only one component rather than a total.
Valid short-term debt component, but appears to be a component rather than a complete total in some years.

variables.notes: Chose a clean total current debt line outside the shortlist. Preferred over combining maturities/components to avoid double counting; row does not mention leases.
No clear balance-sheet row for taxes payable/current tax liabilities. 'Deferred tax' is non-current and not TXP.

candidates.why: Best available total PPE line on the balance sheet, though gross rather than net.
PPE subcomponent only, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation - Property, Plant & Equipment - Cash Flow
candidates.why: Cash-flow expense line, not a balance-sheet PPE stock.
Intangible asset, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Computer Software - Intangible Assets - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Intangible amortization line, not PPE.

variables.notes: Chose the best available total PPE label outside the shortlist. It is gross PPE rather than net PPE, but it is the clearest total PPE row present.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not reported OANCF.

variables.notes: Used the final operating cash flow line, not the pre-working-capital subtotal.
